title: sambucus racemosa var. serratifolia
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. serratifolia, also known as the dwarf elder or Mexican elder, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Sambucus racemosa var. serratifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from fever and headaches. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
